rationale: Educ. Code §29.049 authorizes commissioner rules for supplemental services and instructional materials programs. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner shall adopt rules as necessary to administer the supplemental services and supplemental instructional materials program under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict. The cited education provision governs a wholly unrelated program area.
